name: Freddie Rich
abstract: Frederic Efrem Rich (January 31, 1898 – September 8, 1956) was a Polish-born American bandleader and composer who was active from the 1920s to the 1950s. Among the musicians in his band were the Dorsey Brothers, Joe Venuti, Bunny Berigan, and Benny Goodman.

about_quotes.speaker: Jack Teagarden
about_quotes.evidence: when I got to New York, he had just gotten up there and he was working with Freddie Rich.
